title: Arrhenius Rate Law for a Catalytic Packed-Bed Reactor
strategies: constant / mean predictor of training k (trivial baseline)
temperature-only Arrhenius fit ln k ~ ln A - E/T, ignoring concentration (greedy)
full log-linear Arrhenius fit ln k ~ ln A - E/T + n*ln C via 3x3 normal equations (strong)
add curvature / concentration-order corrections discovered from data
